header.name: Bedrock-TPA §r(§a1.1.5§r)
header.description: §aA script that request a teleportation to another player or even go back to your recent location.

settings.text:
§lBedrockTPA§r
§6NOTE: Changing these settings requires you to restart the world to apply the changes.

Commands Cooldown
§iThis is used by non-operator commands to cooldown the usage
settings.name: bedrocktpa:commandsCooldown

settings.text:
Random Teleportation Radius
§iThe radius of the random teleportation about how far the player will go.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:randomTeleportationRadius

settings.text:
Request Timeout
§iThe teleprotation timeout of each requests.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:teleportationTimeout

settings.text:
Teleportation Delay
§iTeleportation delay before proceeding on teleporting.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:teleportationDelay

settings.text:
Enable message prefix
§iUsed the addon message prefix that you see every single messages from this addon: [BedrockTPA]
settings.name: bedrocktpa:messagePrefix

settings.text:
Back Features
§iThis feature allow players to save their recent location after death or teleportation
settings.name: bedrocktpa:enableBackCommand

settings.text:
Save Death Location
§iSave the death location to with "/back" command
settings.name: bedrocktpa:saveDeath

settings.text:
Save Previous Location
§iSave the previous location after using rtpa, tpa, or tpahere.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:saveTeleportation

settings.text:
Allow Spectator
§iAllow spectators to use commands from this addon.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:allowSpectator

settings.text:
Detect Movement
§iUsed to cancel teleportation process if the player is moving.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:detectMovement

settings.text:
Detect Combat
§iUsed to cancel teleportation process if the player was in combat within 15 seconds.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:detectCombat

settings.text:
Sound Effects
§iUsed to apply sound effects for each events in the addon.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:soundEffects

settings.text:
Interdimensional Travel
§iUsed to allow players to teleport to a player from another dimension.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:interdimensionalTravel

settings.text:
Invincibility
§iUsed to protect players from any damage after teleporting to the new location.
settings.name: bedrocktpa:invincibility
